name: mgsbot
description: Conversational Telegram bot with long-term memory, emergent personality, and multi-modal capabilities
author: Mio Gato Software

scripts.release:patch: bun pm version patch -m 'chore: bump version to v%s [skip ci]'
scripts.release:minor: bun pm version minor -m 'chore: bump version to v%s [skip ci]'
scripts.release:major: bun pm version major -m 'chore: bump version to v%s [skip ci]'
